prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Motion Sensor**  
   - **User:** late4marshmellow  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - `_TZE200_kb5noeto` (Driver: presence_sensor_radar)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#163](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/163)  
   - **State:** Open  

2. **Unnamed Device**  
   - **User:** late4marshmellow  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (Driver: motion_sensor)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#164](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/164)  
   - **State:** Open  

3. **Fingerbot Plus**  
   - **User:** AntondK88  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (Drivers: curtain_motor, fingerbot)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#869](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869)  
   - **State:** Open  

## Supported Fingerprints
- **Existing Fingerprints:**  
  - `_TZE200_kb5noeto` (presence_sensor_radar)  
  - `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (motion_sensor)  
  - `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (curtain_motor, fingerbot)  

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks identified for integration at this time.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **PR Link:** [#10](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)  
   - **State:** Closed  

2. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **PR Link:** [#45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)  
   - **State:** Merged  

3. **Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`

4. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**

5. **Added TS110E driver**

6. **Added 3 new devices**

7. **Update driver.compose.json**

This summary provides an overview of the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project. For further details, please refer to the linked issues and pull requests.
